expectations.text: Addresses co-existence — calls context.removeCurrentMode() or context.removeAllModes() when switching modes, OR explicitly notes simultaneous co-existence is intentional
expectations.evidence: setupRecognition() calls context.removeCurrentMode() with a comment: 'BarcodeCapture and IdCapture modes can co-exist with limitations... We remove any pre-existing mode so that IdCapture can operate with full functionality on this screen.'
Line 55: idCapture = IdCapture(context: context, settings: settings)

expectations.text: Sets up IdCaptureSettings with acceptedDocuments and scanner
expectations.evidence: settings.acceptedDocuments = [IdCard(region: .any), DriverLicense(region: .any), Passport(region: .any)] and settings.scanner = IdCaptureScanner(physicalDocument: FullDocumentScanner()).

expectations.text: Implements IdCaptureListener with didCapture and didReject
expectations.evidence: Extension on IdCaptureViewController conforms to IdCaptureListener and implements both idCapture(_:didCapture:) and idCapture(_:didReject:reason:).

expectations.text: Manages camera lifecycle in viewWillAppear / viewDidDisappear
expectations.evidence: viewWillAppear calls camera?.switch(toDesiredState: .on); viewDidDisappear calls camera?.switch(toDesiredState: .off).
